title: 2031 Census of England and Wales confirmed
body: "On 17 June 2025 the UK Statistics Authority published their recommendation to hold a 2031 Census of England and Wales. This has been considered by HM Government and Georgia Gould MP, Parliamentary Secretary for Cabinet Office, has today responded to Sir Robert Chote, UK Statistics Authority Chair, to confirm the 2031 Census of England and Wales. This letter is published in both England and Welsh. "
